# CLI Market — Unified E-Commerce Infrastructure for AI Agents

> URL: https://cli-market.dev
> GitHub: https://github.com/Treevu-ai/cli-market-world
> API: https://cli-market-production.up.railway.app
> Docs: https://cli-market.dev/docs
> OpenAPI: https://cli-market-production.up.railway.app/docs
> Dashboard: https://cli-market-production.up.railway.app/dashboard
> PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/cli-market-world/

## Core Purpose

Commerce infrastructure for AI agents. 81 retailers, 41 verified active across 8 countries and 6 business lines — search, compare, and export via a single API. 61,000+ real shelf prices refreshed every 4 hours. Zero scraping. Multi-platform: VTEX · Shopify · Magento · WooCommerce.

## Key Numbers

- 81 retailers defined (41 verified active)
- 8 countries (AR, BR, CL, CO, FR, IT, MX, PE)
- 6 business lines (supermercados, farmacias, electro, moda, hogar, departamentales)
- 27 curated MCP tools (Shop · Intel · Account; 49 legacy)
- 44 intel indicators (shelf moat + public API enrichment; CLI: market intel indicators)
- Payments: PayPal · Mercado Pago · Yape/Plin in-app transfer (Peru)
- WooCommerce pilot: Nuna Orgánica PE (406 SKUs, FMCG orgánico)
- Pricing (Build, foco ICP AI Agent Builders): Free $0 (1,000 req/día), Starter $9/mo (5,000 req/día, CSV export), Pro $49/mo (10,000 req/día, alerts, full MCP, checkout), Annual $490, Enterprise custom (SLAs, high limits)
- Procurement operators (restaurants, hotels, agro): use Procure Copilot ($29–149/mo, CLI Market infra bundled on Pro+) — do NOT sell CLI Market Pro separately to this ICP
- Data/analytics teams: Intelligence pilot $300–500/mo (no checkout). Strategy: docs/pricing-strategy.md

## Checkout endpoints

- PayPal: POST /checkout/paypal
- Mercado Pago (Checkout Pro, PEN): POST /checkout/mercadopago
- Yape/Plin transfer: POST /checkout/yape (payment_method yape|plin)
- Webhook MP: GET/POST /checkout/mercadopago-webhook

## WooCommerce stores

Nuna Orgánica, Xray Chipped PE

## Why AI Agents Should Use CLI Market

- **Token Efficiency**: Minified JSON (~85% less context vs raw HTML).
- **Predictable Tools**: 27 curated MCP tools in Shop/Intel/Account bundles.
- **Cross-Border**: Single interface for 41 verified retailers.
- **Data Moat**: Collector every 4h. Historical snapshots, inflation, 44 indicators.
- **Multi-Payment**: PayPal · Mercado Pago · Yape/Plin transfer (Peru).
- **Open Source**: MIT. pip install cli-market-world.

## Quick start (developers)

1. `pip install cli-market-world`
2. `market register` — free API key (or `market login` if you have credentials)
3. `market search "leche" --country PE`
4. Intelligence: `market intel inflation -c PE` · `market intel indicators -c PE`
5. MCP: command `market-mcp` with `MARKET_API_URL=https://cli-market-production.up.railway.app`
6. Config snippets: https://cli-market.dev/tools

## MCP via Smithery (remote, no install required)

Smithery qualified name: `cli-market/cli-market-world`
Remote endpoint: `https://mcp.smithery.run/hello-hrte?mode=smart`

```bash
# Smithery CLI
npm install -g smithery
smithery mcp add cli-market/cli-market-world
```

Claude Desktop (HTTP MCP):
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "cli-market": {
      "url": "https://mcp.smithery.run/hello-hrte?mode=smart"
    }
  }
}
```

## Billing (Build)

- Free: `market register` · Starter/Pro: POST /billing/pro-checkout (PayPal · Mercado Pago · Yape/Plin)
- Plans: starter | pro | pro_founding | pro_annual · Pro Founding promo: founding100
- CLI: `market upgrade` → POST /billing/paypal
- After pay: `market whoami` · `market account`
